source_meta.source_document: Aequalis Perform Reversed and Shoulder Arthroplasty Solutions

systems.system_notes: Reverse shoulder arthroplasty platform within the Tornier Aequalis family for cuff-deficient and complex shoulder reconstruction.

trays.tray_notes: Official Stryker/Tornier materials support dedicated reverse shoulder instrumentation and linked shoulder arthroplasty resources.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe the humeral stem platform used within the reverse shoulder construct.
Official materials describe the reverse glenoid baseplate fixation platform.
Official materials describe the glenosphere family within the reverse construct.
Official materials describe the reverse humeral bearing component used in the construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public reverse shoulder pages define the implant construct but do not expose a public implant code table in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper brochure, IFU, or technique pass is required for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
